creator: lysfjord.daniel@smokepit.net
text:
Seems a bit angry about something missing:

===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for netdata-1.43.2_1 from /usr/ports/net-mgmt/netdata/files
No file to patch.  Skipping...
2 out of 2 hunks ignored--saving rejects to src/collectors/freebsd.plugin/freebsd_kstat_zfs.c.rej
Can't create src/collectors/freebsd.plugin/freebsd_kstat_zfs.c.rej, output is in /tmp/patchr0U3wNhQAy7: No such file or directory
===>  FAILED Applying FreeBSD patch-src_collectors_freebsd.plugin_freebsd_kstat_zfs.c
===> Cleanly applied FreeBSD patch(es)  patch-Makefile.am patch-collectors_python.d.plugin_Makefile.am patch-collectors_python.d.plugin_python.d.plugin.in patch-collectors_python.d.plugin_python__modules_bases_loaders.py patch-configure.ac patch-daemon_analytics.c patch-daemon_main.c
===> FAILED to apply cleanly FreeBSD patch(es)  patch-src_collectors_freebsd.plugin_freebsd_kstat_zfs.c
*** Error code 1
